gitCommit.subject: fix(ts): TS2739 CartsListPage — EmptyState.action usa objeto {label,onClick} em vez de ReactElement
gitCommit.body:
fix(ts): TS2739 CartsListPage — EmptyState.action usa objeto {label,onClick} em vez de ReactElement

EmptyState.action espera { label: string; onClick: () => void } mas o
Lovable passava <Button> JSX → TS2739: ReactElement missing label/onClick.

Fixes:
- action: <Button onClick=...> → action: canCreateCart ? { label, onClick } : undefined
- icon={ShoppingCart} → variant='cart' (ShoppingCart via variant, sem prop unknown)
- Remove ShoppingCart do import lucide-react (unused após variant fix)
